name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Constants *)
N == 5

(* Helper functions *)
LEFT(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
RIGHT(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

(* Initial state *)
Init == 
  /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]  (* 0 means fork is free *)
  /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

(* Next state *)
Next == 
  \E i \in 1..N :
    \/ (* Philosopher i picks up left fork *)
       /\ states[i] = "hungry"
       /\ forks[LEFT(i)] = 0
       /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LEFT(i)] = i]
       /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
    \/ (* Philosopher i picks up right fork *)
       /\ states[i] = "hungry"
       /\ forks[RIGHT(i)] = 0
       /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![RIGHT(i)] = i]
       /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
    \/ (* Philosopher i puts down left fork *)
       /\ states[i] = "eating"
       /\ forks[LEFT(i)] = i
       /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LEFT(i)] = 0]
       /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
    \/ (* Philosopher i puts down right fork *)
       /\ states[i] = "eating"
       /\ forks[RIGHT(i)] = i
       /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![RIGHT(i)] = 0]
       /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
    \/ (* Philosopher i becomes hungry *)
       /\ states[i] = "thinking"
       /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
    \/ (* Philosopher i continues thinking *)
       /\ states[i] = "thinking"
       /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]
    \/ (* Forks remain unchanged *)
       /\ forks' = forks
       /\ states' = states

(* Invariant: No two adjacent philosophers are eating simultaneously *)
TypeOK == 
  /\ forks \in [1..N -> 1..N]  (* fork ownership is a mapping from fork to philosopher *)
  /\ states \in [1..N -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]
  /\ \A i \in 1..N :
       states[i] = "eating" => forks[LEFT(i)] = i /\ forks[RIGHT(i)] = i

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES num, flag

Init == /\ num = 0
      /\ flag = <<>>

Next == /\ num' = num + 1
      /\ flag' = Append(flag, 0)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, count

Init == /\ q \in Seq(1..K)
        /\ head \in 1..K
        /\ tail \in 1..K
        /\ count \in 0..K
        /\ q = [i \in 1..K |-> 0]
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1
        /\ count = 0

ProducerAction == /\ count < K
                 /\ q[tail] = 0
                 /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![tail] = 1]
                 /\ tail' = IF tail = K THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
                 /\ count' = count + 1
                 /\ head' = head

ConsumerAction == /\ count > 0
                 /\ q[head] = 1
                 /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![head] = 0]
                 /\ head' = IF head = K THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
                 /\ count' = count - 1
                 /\ tail' = tail

Next == ProducerAction \/ ConsumerAction

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, count>>

name: Raft Leader Election
Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == /\ readers = <<>>
        /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ \E r \in 1..10 : /\ r \notin readers
              /\ writer_active' = FALSE
                 /\ readers' = Append(readers, r)
          \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
              /\ \E r \in 1..10 : /\ r \in readers
                 /\ writer_active' = FALSE
                 /\ readers' = Remove(readers, r)
          \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
              /\ \E r \in 1..10 : /\ r \notin readers
                 /\ writer_active' = TRUE
                 /\ readers' = readers
          \/ /\ writer_active = TRUE
              /\ writer_active' = FALSE
              /\ readers' = readers

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES token

Init == /\ token \in 1..N

Next == /\ token' \in 1..N
        /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token>>

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values
VARIABLES kvStore

Init == 
  /\ kvStore \in [Keys -> Values]
  /\ \A k \in Keys: kvStore[k] = 0

Next == 
  \/ \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values : 
       /\ kvStore' = [kvStore EXCEPT ![k] = v]
  \/ \E k \in Keys: 
       /\ kvStore' = kvStore

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<kvStore>>

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE
VARIABLES ackedChunks, retransmitCount, sentChunks

    /\ file \in Seq
    /\ Len(file) = FILE_SIZE
    /\ chunks = [i \in 1..Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE) |-> 

            SubSeq(file, (i-1)*CHUNK_SIZE + 1, i*CHUNK_SIZE)

            SubSeq(file, (i-1)*CHUNK_SIZE + 1, FILE_SIZE)]
    /\ sentChunks = <<>>
    /\ retransmitCount = 0
    /\ ackedChunks = <<>>

Next ==
    /\ sentChunks' = Append(sentChunks, SubSeq(chunks, retransmitCount + 1, retransmitCount + 1))
    /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount + 1
    /\ ackedChunks' = IF retransmitCount' <= Len(chunks) THEN

            Append(ackedChunks, retransmitCount')

            ackedChunks

        ackedChunks

Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_<<sentChunks, retransmitCount, ackedChunks>>

TypeOK ==
    /\ file \in Seq
    /\ Len(file) = FILE_SIZE
    /\ chunks \in [1..Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE) -> Seq]
    /\ sentChunks \in Seq
    /\ retransmitCount \in Nat
    /\ ackedChunks \in Seq
    /\ Len(ackedChunks) <= retransmitCount
    /\ Len(ackedChunks) <= Len(chunks)
    /\ \A i \in 1..Len(chunks) : 

            SubSeq(chunks, i, i) \in sentChunks

            SubSeq(chunks, i, i) \notin sentChunks
